dc:title: Loaded Touring Bicycle Beside a Rural Road
dc:description: A color negative image showing a two-lane paved road stretching into the distance through a dry rural landscape. In the left foreground, a touring bicycle loaded with panniers and gear is leaned against a metal guardrail beside the shoulder. A concrete retaining wall runs along the left side of the road, topped by shrubs and trees. On the right side, a fence line borders fields and low vegetation, with hills or mountains visible in the hazy background under a pale blue sky. The scene suggests a roadside stop during bicycle travel in a sparsely populated countryside setting.
